title: Norwegian Rice Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy rice stir fry dish inspired by Norwegian cuisine. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 2 cups of chopped fluffy and 1/2 cup of broken noodles to the skillet. Cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add 1 cup of fluffy rice to the skillet and stir to combine with fluffy and noodles.
Add 2 tablespoons of Norwegian smoked salmon paste to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the rice is lightly toasted.
